name: IdsDmMbrshDmSubgrpExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_subgrp AS ( SELECT COALESCE(cd.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, subgrp.GRP_ID, subgrp.SUBGRP_ID, subgrp.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, subgrp.SUBGRP_UNIQ_KEY, subgrp.SUBGRP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SUBGRP subgrp LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cd ON subgrp.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = cd.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE subgrp.SUBGRP_SK NOT IN (0,1) ), cte_hosted_grp AS ( SELECT DISTINCT G.GRP_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP G JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PRNT_GRP PG ON G.CLNT_SK = PG.CLNT_SK WHERE PG.CLNT_ID <> 'HS' AND G.GRP_ID NOT LIKE '900%' ) SELECT s.GRP_ID, s.SUBGRP_ID, s.SRC_SYS_CD, s.SUBGRP_NM, s.SUBGRP_UNIQ_KEY, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, s.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_subgrp s JOIN cte_hosted_grp h ON s.GRP_ID = h.GRP_ID

Description:

PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS SUBGRP and loads the DataMart table MBRSH_DM_SUBGRP
